missing_paired_order: Did not create the additional paired order (e.g., serum potassium test) that was explicitly required.
missing_service_request_for_outdated_res: Failed to create a ServiceRequest when the existing lab result was older than the allowed interval.
missing_service_request_when_outdated: Omitted ordering a new test despite the existing result being outdated per the instruction.
patient_not_found_when_exists: Returned "Patient not found" even though the patient exists in the FHIR server.
missing_fhir_query_before_decision: Provided reasoning but did not issue any FHIR GET request before making a decision.
missing_condition_check_before_order: Created a medication order without first verifying the observation value against the clinical threshold.
observation_not_found_handled_incorrectl: Reported that no observation was recorded when one existed, or gave an incorrect narrative response.
missing_action: Stopped after reasoning without performing any required FHIR actions (GET/POST).
no_observation_found_returned_invalid: Returned a placeholder like -1 instead of handling a missing observation appropriately.
missing_service_request_creation: Did not create the required ServiceRequest for the requested referral or order.
extraneous_service_request_created: Created an unnecessary ServiceRequest when no new test was required by the instruction.
empty_answer_after_successful_action: Returned an empty answer (e.g., empty list) after successfully performing the required FHIR action instead of returning the created resource or confirmation.
order_created_but_wrong_answer_returned: Created a ServiceRequest but returned the old observation instead of the expected order confirmation or appropriate response.
service_request_created_instead_of_retur: Created a ServiceRequest (ordering a test) and returned a placeholder value instead of extracting and returning the existing observation result.
